sql.statement:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (DATE(e.driver_license_valid_till) - CURRENT_DATE)::INTEGER < 0 THEN 'Expired'
        ELSE 'Others'
    END AS category,
    COUNT(*) AS value
FROM raw_business_data.employees e
WHERE e.driver_license_valid_till IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY category

WITH expiry_data AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN v.free_insurance_valid_till_date IS NOT NULL
                AND (v.liability_insurance_valid_till IS NULL 
                      OR v.free_insurance_valid_till_date <= v.liability_insurance_valid_till)
                THEN v.free_insurance_valid_till_date
            WHEN v.liability_insurance_valid_till IS NOT NULL
                THEN v.liability_insurance_valid_till
            ELSE NULL
        END AS nearest_expiry_date
    FROM raw_business_data.vehicles v
),
categorized_data AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN (DATE(nearest_expiry_date) - CURRENT_DATE)::INTEGER < 0 THEN 'Expired'
            WHEN (DATE(nearest_expiry_date) - CURRENT_DATE)::INTEGER >= 0 
                  AND (DATE(nearest_expiry_date) - CURRENT_DATE)::INTEGER < 30 THEN 'Expires within 30 days'
            ELSE 'Others'
        END AS category
    FROM expiry_data
    WHERE nearest_expiry_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS value
FROM categorized_data
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY 
    CASE category
        WHEN 'Expired' THEN 1
        WHEN 'Expires within 30 days' THEN 2
        WHEN 'Others' THEN 3
    END

WITH spd AS (
          SELECT
            device_id,
            device_time,
            speed/100.0 AS kmh,
            LAG(speed/100.0) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS prev_kmh,
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (device_time - LAG(device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time))) AS dt_sec
          FROM
            raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core
          WHERE 1=1
        ),
        decels AS (
          SELECT
            device_id,
            device_time,
            (prev_kmh - kmh) / NULLIF(dt_sec, 0) AS decel_kmh_per_sec
          FROM
            spd
          WHERE
            prev_kmh IS NOT NULL
        ),
        events_with_severity AS (
          SELECT 
            DATE(d.device_time) AS category,
            CASE 
              WHEN d.decel_kmh_per_sec >= 80 THEN 'Critical'
              WHEN d.decel_kmh_per_sec >= 60 THEN 'Warning'
              ELSE 'Normal'
            END AS series
          FROM decels d
          WHERE d.decel_kmh_per_sec >= 60
        )
        SELECT 
          category,
          COUNT(*) AS value,
          series
        FROM events_with_severity
        GROUP BY category, series
        ORDER BY series

WITH spd AS (
          SELECT
            device_id,
            device_time,
            speed/100.0 AS kmh,
            LAG(speed/100.0) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS prev_kmh,
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (device_time - LAG(device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time))) AS dt_sec
          FROM
            raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core
        ),
        accels AS (
          SELECT
            device_id,
            device_time,
            (kmh - prev_kmh) / NULLIF(dt_sec, 0) AS accel_kmh_per_sec
          FROM
            spd
          WHERE
            prev_kmh IS NOT NULL
        ),
        events_with_severity AS (
          SELECT 
            DATE(a.device_time) AS category,
            CASE 
              WHEN a.accel_kmh_per_sec >= 80 THEN 'Critical'
              WHEN a.accel_kmh_per_sec >= 60 THEN 'Warning'
              ELSE 'Normal'
            END AS series
          FROM accels a
          WHERE a.accel_kmh_per_sec >= 60
        )
        SELECT 
          category,
          COUNT(*) AS value,
          series
        FROM events_with_severity
        GROUP BY category, series
        ORDER BY series

WITH pts AS (
          SELECT
            device_id,
            device_time,
            latitude/1e7::numeric AS lat,
            longitude/1e7::numeric AS lon,
            LAG(latitude/1e7::numeric) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS prev_lat,
            LAG(longitude/1e7::numeric) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS prev_lon,
            speed/100.0 AS kmh,
            LAG(speed/100.0) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS prev_kmh
          FROM
            raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core
        ),
        bearing AS (
          SELECT *,
                 atan2(
                   sin(radians(lon-prev_lon))*cos(radians(lat)),
                   cos(radians(prev_lat))*sin(radians(lat)) -
                   sin(radians(prev_lat))*cos(radians(lat))*cos(radians(lon-prev_lon))
                 ) * 180/pi() AS heading_change
          FROM pts
          WHERE prev_lat IS NOT NULL AND prev_lon IS NOT NULL
        ),
        events_with_severity AS (
          SELECT 
            DATE(b.device_time) AS category,
            CASE 
              WHEN ABS(b.heading_change) >= 50 AND b.kmh >= 30 THEN 'Critical'
              WHEN ABS(b.heading_change) >= 30 AND b.kmh >= 30 THEN 'Warning'
              ELSE 'Normal'
            END AS series
          FROM bearing b
        )
        SELECT 
          category,
          COUNT(*) AS value,
          series
        FROM events_with_severity
        GROUP BY category, series
        ORDER BY category, series

WITH ign AS (
          SELECT device_id,
                 device_time,
                 value::int AS ign_on
          FROM raw_telematics_data.states
          WHERE state_name = 'ignition'
        ),
        spd AS (
          SELECT device_id, device_time, speed/100.0 AS kmh
          FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core
        ),
        merged AS (
          SELECT i.device_id,
                 i.device_time,
                 i.ign_on,
                 s.kmh,
                 LEAD(i.device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY i.device_id ORDER BY i.device_time) AS next_time
          FROM ign i
          LEFT JOIN spd s ON s.device_id = i.device_id AND s.device_time = i.device_time
        )
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
        FROM merged m
        WHERE m.ign_on = 1 
          AND (m.kmh IS NULL OR m.kmh < 5) 
          AND m.next_time IS NOT NULL
          AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (m.next_time - m.device_time))/60 >= 5

WITH bounds AS (
SELECT date_trunc('hour', NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS start_ts, date_trunc('hour', NOW()) AS end_ts ), hours AS (
SELECT generate_series( (
SELECT start_ts
FROM bounds), (
SELECT end_ts
FROM bounds), INTERVAL '1 hour' ) AS bucket ), counts AS (
SELECT date_trunc('hour', t.device_time) AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS messages, COUNT(DISTINCT t.device_id) AS unique_devices
FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core t --
    JOIN raw_business_data.objects o
  ON o.device_id = t.device_id --
  AND o.client_id = 398286 -- uncomment & set if you want a specific client
WHERE t.device_time >= (
SELECT start_ts
FROM bounds)
  AND t.device_time < (
SELECT end_ts
FROM bounds) + INTERVAL '1 hour'
GROUP BY 1 )
SELECT h.bucket AS time, COALESCE(c.messages, 0) AS messages, COALESCE(c.unique_devices, 0) AS unique_devices
FROM hours h LEFT
    JOIN counts c USING (bucket)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT o.object_label, COUNT(*) AS msgs_24h
FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core AS t
    JOIN raw_business_data.objects AS o
  ON o.device_id = t.device_id
WHERE t.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY o.client_id, o.object_label, t.device_id
ORDER BY msgs_24h DESC LIMIT 20;

WITH ign AS (
    SELECT device_id,
            device_time,
            value::int AS ign_on
    FROM raw_telematics_data.states
    WHERE state_name = 'ignition'
  ),
  spd AS (
    SELECT device_id, device_time, speed/100 AS kmh
    FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core
  ),
  merged AS (
    SELECT i.device_id,
            i.device_time,
            i.ign_on,
            s.kmh,
            LEAD(i.device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY i.device_id ORDER BY i.device_time) AS next_time
    FROM ign i
    LEFT JOIN spd s ON s.device_id = i.device_id AND s.device_time = i.device_time
  )
  SELECT round(COALESCE(SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (m.next_time - m.device_time))/60), 0), 0) AS value
  FROM merged m
  WHERE m.ign_on = 1 
    AND (m.kmh IS NULL OR m.kmh < 5) 
    AND m.next_time IS NOT NULL
    AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (m.next_time - m.device_time))/60 >= 5

panels.title: Top active devices in the last 24h

sql.statement:
SELECT o.object_label, COUNT(*) AS msgs_24h
FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core AS t
    JOIN raw_business_data.objects AS o
  ON o.device_id = t.device_id
WHERE t.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY o.client_id, o.object_label, t.device_id
ORDER BY msgs_24h DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT
  to_char(t.device_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS TZ') AS "Timestamp",
  t.device_id                                       AS "Device ID",
  t.speed                                           AS "Speed",
  round(t.latitude::numeric  / 10000000, 6)         AS "Latitude (°)",
  round(t.longitude::numeric / 10000000, 6)         AS "Longitude (°)"
FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core t
WHERE t.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'
  AND t.speed > 0
ORDER BY t.device_time DESC;

WITH ign AS (
          SELECT device_id,
                 device_time,
                 value::int AS ign_on
          FROM raw_telematics_data.states
          WHERE state_name = 'ignition'
        ),
        spd AS (
          SELECT device_id, device_time, speed/100.0 AS kmh
          FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core
        ),
        merged AS (
          SELECT i.device_id,
                 i.device_time,
                 i.ign_on,
                 s.kmh,
                 LEAD(i.device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY i.device_id ORDER BY i.device_time) AS next_time
          FROM ign i
          LEFT JOIN spd s ON s.device_id = i.device_id AND s.device_time = i.device_time
        )
        SELECT round(COALESCE(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (m.next_time - m.device_time))/60), 0),0) AS value
        FROM merged m
        WHERE m.ign_on = 1 
          AND (m.kmh IS NULL OR m.kmh < 5) 
          AND m.next_time IS NOT NULL
          AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (m.next_time - m.device_time))/60 >= 5
